title: Robotic Compliant Object Prying Using Diffusion Policy Guided by Vision and Force Observations
title_zh: 基于视觉与力观测引导的扩散策略的机器人柔顺物体撬取
abstract: The growing adoption of batteries in the electric vehicle industry and various consumer products has created an urgent need for effective recycling solutions. These products often contain a mix of compliant and rigid components, making robotic disassembly a critical step toward achieving scalable recycling processes. Diffusion policy has emerged as a promising approach for learning low-level skills in robotics. To effectively apply diffusion policy to contact-rich tasks, incorporating force as feedback is essential. In this paper, we apply diffusion policy with vision and force in a compliant object prying task. However, when combining low-dimensional contact force with high-dimensional image, the force information may be diluted. To address this issue, we propose a method that effectively integrates force with image data for diffusion policy observations. We validate our approach on a battery prying task that demands high precision and multi-step execution. Our model achieves a 96% success rate in diverse scenarios, marking a 57% improvement over the vision-only baseline. Our method also demonstrates zero-shot transfer capability to handle unseen objects and battery types.
abstract_zh: 随着电动汽车行业及各类消费产品中电池的日益普及，对高效回收解决方案的需求变得迫切。这些产品通常包含柔顺与刚性部件的混合，使得机器人拆解成为实现可扩展回收流程的关键步骤。扩散策略已成为机器人学习低级技能的一种有前景的方法。为了将扩散策略有效应用于接触密集型任务，将力作为反馈纳入至关重要。在本文中，我们将扩散策略与视觉和力相结合，应用于柔顺物体撬取任务。然而，当将低维接触力与高维图像结合时，力信息可能会被稀释。为解决此问题，我们提出了一种方法，将力与图像数据有效整合到扩散策略的观测中。我们在一个要求高精度和多步骤执行的电池撬取任务上验证了我们的方法。我们的模型在多种场景下实现了96%的成功率，相比仅依赖视觉的基线提升了57%。我们的方法还展示了零样本迁移能力，能够处理未见过的物体和电池类型。
tldr_zh: 结合视觉与力观测的扩散策略在电池撬取任务中达96%成功率，较纯视觉提升57%
cover_zh: 机器人撬电池成功率96%｜力觉+视觉让扩散策略不再“瞎”撬
